control.description-key: A Power Apps PCF control that provides AI-powered text suggestions using Claude.

property.name: value
property.description-key: The text value of the field.

property.name: placeholder
property.description-key: Placeholder text shown when the field is empty.

property.name: aiInstruction
property.description-key: Instruction sent to the AI. E.g. 'Improve this text', 'Summarise this', 'Fix grammar'.

property.name: apiKey
property.description-key: Your Anthropic API key. Use an environment variable in production.
